name: Shenghe Resources Holding Co., Ltd
summary: Shenghe Resources Holding Co., Ltd develops, produces, and supplies rare earth (RE) resource and relevant products in China and internationally. Its principal products include RE concentrates, RE oxidants, RE compounds, RE metals, RE metallurgical materials, RE catalysts, zircon sand, titanium concentrate, and rutile. The company also provides monazite; rare earth ferrosilicon, Si-Ba inoculants, vermiculizer, spheroidizing agents, etc.; kyanite; and molecule sieves, as well as various chemical compounds, including oxalic acid, ammonium nitrate, ammonium chloride, and thionyl chloride. Its products are used in new energy and materials, energy conservation and environmental protection, aerospace, military, and electronics industries. The company was formerly known as Tiancheng Co., Ltd. Of Taiyuan University Of Technology and changed its name to Shenghe Resources Holding Co., Ltd in January 2013. The company is headquartered in Chengdu, China.
